Lines.Text: Direct, then. The lower section of this facility is overrun with units we classify as Discards. F-class facility maintenance bots, original instruction sets corrupted, presently unaffiliated and dangerous to traffic.

The Front would prefer they were not. Eliminate them. Confirm completion. In exchange: a keycard granting transit access to the Free Robot settlement north of here, navigation data, and one hundred credits.
Successful execution opens further conversation. The Front is selective. We are also growing.

Choices.Text: What's in it for me beyond the credits?
